chunks.title: Jehu's Purge of Ahab's Line
chunks.reason: A continuous narrative describing Jehu's letters to Samaria, the slaughter of Ahab's seventy sons, and his journey to kill Ahaziah's relatives.

chunks.title: The Destruction of Baal Worship
chunks.reason: A coherent narrative unit where Jehu gathers the prophets of Baal, tricks them into a temple, and systematically destroys their cult.

chunks.title: Evaluation and Conclusion of Jehu's Reign
chunks.reason: A concluding section containing historical evaluation, a divine oracle regarding the dynasty, and the summary of his reign.
